title: AI Extractor Column change column type to Timeline
excerpt:

posts.author: aholling (Amanda Holling)
posts.cookedHtml:
Team would like the ability to change an AI Extractor column into a Timeline column. Right now only have ability to change column type to Date column. This loses timeframe information (date windows).

Our workflow would be:

    1. Manually type out schedule in dropbox paper. Here’s an example:
      **9/9 M: Jan footwear + apparel arrive at Carousel
      **9/9 M - 9/12 TH: Take inventory / prep product
      **9/11 W: Carousel to pick up Feb apparel + footwear from UGG
      **9/16 M - 9/20 F (4.5 days): SHOOT Apparel
      **9/20 F: Set up for footwear
      **9/23 M-9/25W (2 days): SHOOT Footwear
      **10/1 T - 10/2 W (2 days): Organize and ship drive
      **10/03 TH: UGG confirms receipt of drive
      *2. Copy + paste schedule into Monday Group where it auto generates list of items
      *3. Set up AI Extractor column as:
      **Choose AI action: “Extract info”
      **Choose info source: “Item name”
      **Choose info to extact: “Custom info”
      **Describe what to extract: “timeframe as of 2024”
      *4. AI Extractor column then populates with dates (singular or time ranges)
      *5. Once automation complete, go to AI Extractor column and select > Change Column Type > Timeline
      *6. Column then changes into a Timeline column (where singular or timeframe ranges are shown)

Thanks,
Amanda
